_comment: Phase 4 / Gate 4 evidence manifest — LLM orchestration (self-hosted abstraction, RAG, faithfulness gate, C7). Parsed fail-closed. The LLM is ADVISORY: it never emits an ActionRecord or AgentCommand. Cloud DeepSeek is dev/test ONLY (ADR-002).

criteria.title: Recovery plan recs traceable to playbook; untraceable blocked
criteria.expected: faithful plan: zero unsupported claims, passed=true

criteria.title: Report conforms to the structured C7 JSON schema
Report/map/plan conform to C7; every plan step has playbook_ref
criteria.expected: every RecoveryPlan step carries a non-empty playbook_ref; blast-radius derived from context

criteria.title: LLM down: detection+containment continue, report queues
criteria.expected: LLM_UNAVAILABLE, degraded=true, no crash, blast-radius still returned

gate_checks.check: vitest run packages/test-infra/src/llm.test.ts (incl. LIVE DeepSeek integration)
